title: Your Official English Book Details
explanation_chunks: This page is very similar to the first cover, but it acts like an official title page. It confirms all the important details about your Cambridge Primary English Learner's Book 6.
It clearly states the book's name, edition, and the primary authors and series editors. This ensures you know exactly which version of the textbook you are using.
You'll also see the publisher's name at the bottom, which is the company that produced and printed your book. It's like seeing the brand name on your favourite toy.
examples: You can see 'Marie Lallaway' as an author and 'Christine Chen' and 'Lindsay Pickton' as series editors, just like how a toy might list the designer and the company that made it.
key_points: This page officially confirms the title, edition, and authors of your textbook.
It helps you identify the specific book you'll be using for your English lessons.
Knowing the edition (like 'Second Edition') is useful as textbooks sometimes get updated with new content.

vocabulary.definition: A company or person that prepares and issues books, journals, or music for sale.

explain_again: This page is like the official ID card for your English book. It has all the important names and titles to show you it's the right one for your learning this year!
fun_analogy: Think of this page as the official badge on your new school uniform, showing everyone what group you belong to – the Cambridge Primary English learners!
